description: Emaildojo is a free AI-powered email toolkit for marketers to check spam scores, generate subject lines, test authentication, and monitor domain health before sending campaigns.
tagline: Free AI tools to optimize email deliverability
overview: Emaildojo is a free, AI-powered email toolkit that helps marketers diagnose and fix common deliverability and content issues before campaigns go out. It covers spam scoring, subject line generation, domain health checks, blocklist removal, and email authentication testing, with results delivered instantly and no credit card required.
what_is: Emaildojo is a free, AI-powered email tool built for marketers and businesses that want to improve campaign performance without added cost. It addresses practical problems that commonly derail email programs, including spam filtering, weak subject lines, domain health issues, and authentication failures. Every feature is accessible immediately, with no credit card or account setup required.

The toolkit is most useful when preparing campaigns: teams can check spam scores, generate and test subject line variants, verify authentication records, and request removal from blocklists, all within minutes. That speed makes it a practical pre-send checklist tool for busy marketers who want quick, actionable feedback before hitting send.

Emaildojo complements the broader email marketing stack by covering deliverability diagnostics and content optimization rather than sending or contact management. It is not a CRM or data enrichment tool, and it does not manage subscriber lists. Its value is concentrated in the preparation phase, helping teams avoid common email pitfalls and reach the inbox more consistently.
